document_meta.title: 3M Conformable Bonding Tape BT3005
document_meta.source_text: December 2025 Supersedes version dated February 2020 3M Conformable Bonding Tape BT3005 Technical Data Sheet

sections.source_text: 3M Conformable Bonding Tape BT3005 offers very good adhesion performance and high flexibility. This tape is specially designed for rough or highly irregular surfaces, providing strong adhesion for applications such as automotive wire harness assembly, and offering excellent conformability for sealing applications. 3M Conformable Bonding Tape offers a reduction in VOCs (Volatile Organic Compounds) compared to conventional products.
sections.title: General Description

sections.source_text: Excellent initial adhesion and static performance on uneven substrates; Highly conformable tape for sealing and bonding to rough or irregular surfaces; Demonstrates good visibility due to its light blue color; Excellent adhesion performance with weather resistance, heat resistance, and chemical resistance; Can be applied to various substrates used for automotive parts without special surface treatment.
sections.title: Key Features

sections.source_text: Typical applications for 3M Conformable Bonding Tapes BT3005 include sealing or bonding support for various interior or exterior part attachments and fixing wire harnesses to the headliner.
sections.title: Typical Applications

sections.source_text: Depending on the material (e.g., EPDM rubber), 3M Adhesion Promoter may be required. Please check before use.
sections.title: Application Note

sections.source_text: BT3005 Thickness 0.5 mm; Color Light blue; Liner Paper; Adhesive Acrylic pressure sensitive adhesive; Liner thickness is not included.
sections.title: Product Construction / Physical Properties

sections.source_text: Paper liner / Acrylic pressure sensitive adhesive / Non-woven cloth / Acrylic pressure sensitive adhesive
sections.title: Construction Diagram

sections.source_text: Typical performance of 3M Conformable Bonding Tapes (CBT) BT3005 is shown below. Peel and shear values depend on substrate characteristics and/or paint composition. These values are for reference only, and not to be used for specification purposes.
sections.title: Performance Properties

sections.source_text: Immediate: 23°C x 5 min; Initial State = 23°C, 20 mins; Normal State = 23°C, 24 hours; High Temperature = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C; Heat-aging = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours; Humidity-aging = 23°C, 24 hours -> 50°C 95%RH, 336h -> 23°C, 24 hours.
sections.title: Conditions/Test Parameter Definitions

sections.source_text: Three years (36 months) from date of manufacture when stored at recommended storage condition 23°C and 50% relative humidity.
sections.title: Shelf Life

sections.source_text: The product is published as a material entry and is available for access on www.mdsystem.com. For product IMDS I.D. number, email requests to 3M-IMDSrequest@mmm.com.
sections.title: Regulatory Information
